title: The One Who Watches Sponge Monger
description: Replaces the chase screams with Sponge Monger for old versions of The One Who Watches by PixelCoder.
body:
The original versions of The One Who Watches were spooky and definitely hit the nail on the head for the psychological torture aspect. But what if you wanted to use the mod without a loud, scary scream while the mob chased you? That's where this comes in.

Applying this pack will change the screams from the mob into segments of Sponge Monger from Spongebob, to make it a little less terrifying when you're running from your life.

This pack works on **Minecraft 1.19.2 ONLY and REQUIRES The One Who Watches v1.3.0 or lower**. If you play with v1.4.0 or higher, this pack only affects **the_one_who_watches:toww_running** entity, which is summon-only.

Without the aforementioned mod, this resource pack does nothing.
